title: sonchus asper subsp. glaucescens
intro: Sonchus asper subsp. glaucescens, also known as spiny sow thistle, is a subspecies of thistle in the dandelion-like genus Sonchus. It is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sonchus asper subsp. glaucescens include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and lower blood pressure. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional cooking in some parts of the world.
